## Bug Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- Device: [e.g. Desktop / iPhone 15]
- Plan: [e.g. Free / Starter / Pro / Agency]
- Language: [e.g. Italian / English]
